goal: Make the coding editor look like a light VS Code instance.
summary: CodeEditor is locked to a light/white VS Code-style theme and wrapper with no dark-mode toggle. Production build passes.
stepSummaries: 1. Set CodeEditor theme to 'light' and update wrapper/toolbar colors to a VS Code light palette; remove theme toggle button. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

CodeEditor now uses theme='light' and a VS Code light palette, with the theme toggle removed, meeting the phase goal.
